## Journal.JournalLibrary.getJournalsForRecipeVersion() method

Gets all [recipe journal records](./ts-chocolate.journal.irecipejournalrecord.md) for a specific recipe version

**Signature:**

```typescript
getJournalsForRecipeVersion(versionId: RecipeVersionId): ReadonlyArray<IRecipeJournalRecord>;
```
